title: diospyros pilosanthera var. tayabensis
intro: Diospyros pilosanthera var. tayabensis is a plant species in the family Ebenaceae, commonly known as the ebony tree. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate various health issues. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from respiratory issues. Diospyros pilosanthera var. tayabensis can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and bark can be used to make herbal preparations, including tinctures and ointments.
